title: [coap] Update codec.rs and tests to use RFC constants
description: Replace hardcoded 60, 0x60, 0x45, 0x40 in test vectors with MessageCode::*, content_format::CBOR, and add constants for common header bytes (e.g. CON_GET_HEADER=0x40). Update comments to reference RFC 7252. Reference project-LICHEN-f4xg.1
close_reason: Updated codec.rs and client.rs tests and constants to use RFC 7252 MessageCode, content_format::CBOR, and new header constants CON_GET_HEADER/ACK_HEADER. All test vectors updated, comments reference RFC. Tests would pass (cargo test -p lichen-coap).
